Home › Blog › AI Workflow Automation

How to Automate Your Workflows with AI in 2026

What AI Workflow Automation Means

Connect your tools so they work without you. Example: someone submits your contact form → AI drafts personalized response → creates task in project manager → sends Slack notification. All automatic.

Platform Comparison

FeatureZapierMaken8n
Best ForSimple 2-app automationsComplex multi-step workflowsSelf-hosted, custom automations
Integrations7,000+2,000+400+ (extensible)
Starting Price$20/mo$9/moFree (self-hosted)

5 AI Automations You Can Set Up Today

  1. Email to task: Forward email → AI extracts action items → creates tasks in project manager
  2. Meeting notes to summary: Calendar → AI generates summary → posts to Slack
  3. Form to personalized reply: Contact form → AI drafts response based on FAQ knowledge base
  4. Social media monitoring: AI monitors brand mentions → categorizes by sentiment → alerts support for negatives
  5. Invoice processing: Forward invoices → AI extracts amount, vendor, due date → logs in spreadsheet

FAQ

Zapier - simplest interface, 7,000+ integrations.

Yes - all three have AI assistants that build workflows from plain English.

$9-30/month. Saves 5-10 hours of manual work monthly.
